phrases.intent_en: How do I redeem beer vouchers?
phrases.cultural_note: Vouchers are typically exchanged directly with the 'výčepní' (tapster) who pours the beer.

likely_response.translation_en: At the tapster in the tasting room.

responses.english: At the tapster in the tasting room.

phrases.cultural_note: Czech directions are often terse and rely on landmarks like 'pokladny' (ticket desks).

likely_response.translation_en: To the right behind the ticket desks.

responses.english: To the right behind the ticket desks.

phrases.intent_en: Where is the historic cellar entrance?
phrases.text_local: Kde je vstup do historických sklepů?
phrases.cultural_note: The cellars are underground and only accessible with a tour guide.

phrases.intent_en: Can I book the tour on site?
phrases.text_local: Můžu si prohlídku rezervovat na místě?
phrases.cultural_note: On-site booking is standard at the visitor center, not the main gate.

likely_response.local: Ano, u pokladny v návštěvnickém centru.
likely_response.translation_en: Yes, at the ticket desk in the visitor center.

responses.english: Yes, at the ticket desk in the visitor center.
responses.french: Ano, u pokladny v návštěvnickém centru.

phrases.intent_en: Is the brew house open today?
phrases.cultural_note: The brew house is typically visited as part of a guided tour, so its accessibility is tied to the tour schedule.

likely_response.translation_en: Yes, tours are running all day.

responses.english: Yes, tours are running all day.
